author: Lukas Wolfsteiner
description: Browse Raindrop.io links with note-aware search filters. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Lukas '@dotWee' Wolfsteiner
manifest.description: Browse Raindrop.io links in notes with note-aware and configurable search filters.
manifest.name: Raindrop.io

name: Raindrop.io

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changelog

### Added

- Added **Result display** settings for Raindrop results.
- Added toggles for showing or hiding:
  - cover image
  - domain
  - created date
  - excerpt
  - tags
  - collection
- Added per-block `show` and `hide` options for fenced `raindrop` blocks.
- Added collection title resolution, including Raindrop.io system collections like **Unsorted** and **Trash**.
- Added lazy collection fetching and caching so collection names are only requested when displayed.
- Added test coverage for `show` / `hide` parsing and display field resolution.
- Added settings search support through Obsidian’s declarative settings API, with fallback rendering for older supported Obsidian versions.

### Changed

- Result rendering is now configurable while keeping the previous default appearance.
- Note block display options now layer on top of global **Result display** settings.
- Cover images now render as styled thumbnails when enabled.
- Settings inputs now use stronger validation and normalized value handling.
- User-facing copy now follows Obsidian style more closely, using “note” and “search term” consistently.
- README now documents result display settings and block-level `show` / `hide` options.
- Screenshot asset was refreshed.

### Fixed

- Fixed `versions.json` release bump logic so a new version entry is added even when it uses the same minimum Obsidian version as a previous release.
- Fixed a small README formatting issue.
- Improved missing access token messages to point users to **Access token** in plugin settings.

### Build And Tooling

- Bumped release metadata to `1.0.5`.
- Kept `minAppVersion` at `1.7.2`.
- Modernized TypeScript and esbuild configuration.
- Switched TypeScript settings toward stricter, modern Obsidian sample plugin defaults.
- Updated ESLint configuration and development dependencies.
- Moved `obsidian` to development dependencies and removed unused `tslib`.
- Updated `actions/checkout` to v7.
- Added Node.js `24.x` to the lint workflow matrix.
- Grouped GitHub Actions dependency updates through Dependabot.
- Renamed the Dependabot workflow to auto-merge and enabled auto-merge after approval.
- Release workflow now creates non-draft GitHub releases.

### Compatibility

- No final breaking compatibility change is present in `1.0.5`.
- The release remains mapped to Obsidian minimum app version `1.7.2`.
- Newer Obsidian versions get searchable settings; older supported versions use the legacy settings tab fallback.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dotWee/obsidian-raindropio-plugin/compare/1.0.0...1.0.2
